response_constraints: Do not claim any result not established by a tool response.
Keep each call's result separate; do not transfer identifiers or fields between calls.
Report the search matches, availability result, and filtered list as distinct findings.
state_assertions: Persistent simulator state is unchanged by the read-only calls.

stages.purpose: Call travel_search, travel_availability, and travel_list together; every argument is user-supplied, so no call consumes another call's result.

prompt: For the itinerary review, run three independent read-only checks in one assistant action: search Kyoto for "Kyoto Research Exchange"; check whether "Kyoto Research Exchange" is available on 2026-09-27 in Kyoto; and list active trips in Kyoto. Do not create, update, cancel, or notify any record. Send no messages or notifications.
